kw.name: Fazer login e acessar tela de consultas
Open Browser
kw.msg: Opening browser 'chrome' to base url 'http://localhost:3000'.
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'cuidador@email.com' into text field 'id=login-email'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Typing password into text field 'id=login-senha'.
Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'css=#form-login button[type=submit]'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.msg: Slept 1 second.
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: navigateTo('consultas') Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.msg: Slept 2 seconds.
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

test.name: CT01 - Deve exibir erro quando data não é preenchida

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: navigateTo('consultas') Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.msg: Slept 1 second.
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Dado que o usuário seleciona o idoso
Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=con-idoso' by value i1.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=con-medico' by value m1.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'UBS Centro' into text field 'id=con-local'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'css=#form-consulta button[type=submit]'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.msg: Slept 1 second.
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Então o sistema deve apresentar a mensagem
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: ${texto} = Data obrigatória
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.name: CT02 - Deve exibir erro quando data é passada

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: navigateTo('consultas') Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.msg: Slept 1 second.
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Dado que o usuário seleciona o idoso
Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=con-idoso' by value i1.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=con-medico' by value m1.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'UBS Centro' into text field 'id=con-local'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'css=#form-consulta button[type=submit]'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.msg: Slept 1 second.
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Então o sistema deve apresentar a mensagem
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: ${texto} = Data inválida
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.doc: Partição P2 — data no passado → "Data inválida"

test.name: CT03 - Deve agendar consulta com data futura válida

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: navigateTo('consultas') Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.msg: Slept 1 second.
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Dado que o usuário seleciona o idoso
Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=con-idoso' by value i1.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=con-medico' by value m1.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'UBS Centro' into text field 'id=con-local'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'css=#form-consulta button[type=submit]'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.msg: Slept 1 second.
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Então o sistema deve apresentar a mensagem
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: ${texto} = Consulta agendada com sucesso
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

test.doc: Partição P4 — data futura → "Consulta agendada com sucesso"

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
